training_status: active, increased workout frequency and intensity during protocol

benefits.description: Great improvement in hamstring pain and complete loss of pain in back (T11/12 disc issues). Lasted about three months.
Able to increase frequency and intensity of workouts; both conditions more manageable after stopping.

side_effects.description: Severe lack of physical and emotional sensation developed (anhedonia). Physical sensation during sex was most noticeable change; emotional numbness to things that used to excite. Stopped the cycle due to concern it would lead to depression.
No effect from caffeine, though not abnormally tired. Described as a weird state.

protocol_notes: Could only maintain protocol for a couple months due to side effects (anhedonia/lack of sensation). Benefits lasted about three months after stopping. May try again in future if conditions worsen.
